headline: Qualcomm Stellantis Deal Deepens Automotive Role And AI Driving Ambitions
summary: Qualcomm (NasdaqGS:QCOM) is expanding its automotive partnership with Stellantis to roll out Snapdragon Digital Chassis and Ride Pilot platforms across millions of vehicles. The collaboration includes integration of advanced driver assistance and hands free features across a range of Stellantis models. Qualcomm is also deepening its work with Stellantis’s aiMotive unit to support autonomous driving capabilities and smart mobility systems. For Qualcomm, known by many investors for its...

headline: Qualcomm (QCOM) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of wireless chipmaker Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) jumped 12% in the afternoon session after automaker Stellantis announced an expansion of its multi-year technology collaboration with the company.
